name.description: Specifies the name of the Cognitive Service Account. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

kind.description: Specifies the type of Cognitive Service Account that should be created. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

sku_name.description: Specifies the SKU Name for this Cognitive Service Account. Changing this forces a new resource to be created

public_network_access_enabled.description: Whether public network access is allowed for the Cognitive Account

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
